title: Netherite Sculk Armor Updated
description: This texture pack adds a compatible version for 1.18+ of netherite sculk armor.
body:
This resource pack replaces the netherite armor with a brand new sculk armor for 1.18+ but notice that this texture pack can contains some bugs, so please if you find some report them.

**THE TEXTURES INSIDE THIS TEXTURE PACK AREN'T MINE I ONLY MADE IT SO THEY WORK ON NEWEST VERSIONS**
